creator: freebsd-bugzilla@in-addr.com
text:
Created attachment 220522
poudriere log

I have options SAMBA disabled for kio-extras however it seems that it still tries to include SMB/CIFS related files in the package, which causes packaging to fail


===>  Building package for kio-extras-20.12.0
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/kio-extras/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libexec/kf5/smbnotifier:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/kio-extras/work/stage/usr/local/lib/qt5/plugins/kf5/kded/smbwatcher.so:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
